speaker: Argo
text: Should I invite Lord Scheat...?

speaker: Scheat
text: What did you do today, Argo? *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: Well... I've been investigating a ghost sighting. *sigh*

speaker: Scheat
text: What did you say?

speaker: Argo
text: Oh... I haven't told you yet, have I? Oscar said he saw a ghost.

speaker: Scheat
text: What!? He did!?!

speaker: Argo
text: But Julius said it could a student's E.P.

speaker: Scheat
text: *A soft sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: Lord Scheat?

speaker: Scheat
text: I would not mind if it is an E.P., but… what if it really is a ghost?

speaker: Argo
text: Well... I guess it could be. I still have no idea.

speaker: Scheat
text: That is... troubling! Very troubling indeed!

speaker: Argo
text: Why? *sigh*

speaker: Scheat
text: We must not have something of an unknown nature wandering our halls! *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: But it doesn’t seem like it’s doing anything bad, right? *sigh*

speaker: Scheat
text: That is not the issue!

speaker: Argo
text: Then what is? *sigh*

speaker: Scheat
text: It is frightening!!

speaker: Argo
text: *A sigh*

speaker: Scheat
text: Listen, Argo! You must resolve this problem at once!

speaker: Argo
text: But I don’t even know where to start.

speaker: Scheat
text: Just figure it out! As a dragon, I command you! *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: (It's hard to say no when he puts it like that…)
